name: enterprise-ops
description: 多部门智能经营系统 - 足浴财务模块(一键启动)

scripts.start: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "cd server && npm run dev" "cd web && npm run dev"
scripts.setup: cd server && npm run migrate && npm run seed
scripts.install:all: cd server && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
